note: Vendored snapshot for npm run bootstrap (network-independent). Game data is Ink Stains Games IP under fair use — see /NOTICE.md. Code-derived structure is MIT (Stratos Neiros).

calculatorSource.note: Provenance-only reference for Phase 1 (KTD2): nstratos's calculator JS, pinned to an immutable commit. These files are REFERENCED to transcribe the coefficient table (stat-bonuses.js), economy/LIFO ledger (build-ledger.js), unlock model (ability-unlock-requirements.js), derived-stat bases (character.js), and share format (talent-calculator.js) — never imported or executed by our app or build. Code is MIT (Stratos Neiros); the numbers it encodes are Ink Stains Games IP under fair use (see /NOTICE.md). Re-derivable: numbers in src/data/stat-model.json and src/data/constants.json are transcribed from these, cross-checked against the official wiki (patch 0.9.4.x).
